failed_step: Run governed K-tail shard with uv
step_detail: Step 9 remained in_progress for ~25 minutes then the job failed without a logged Python traceback; typical of runner service disconnect, OOM kill, or hung eigen solve on host uv.
backend_selection_reason: docker info failed in Select execution backend despite docker CLI being installed (docker --version succeeded in Show shard context). GitHub Actions user likely lacks active docker group socket access.
remediation: Re-dispatch K6/N5 to s001-true-qft on main with docker backend
On dekstop: ensure the actions-runner service account is in the docker group and can run docker info without sg/sudo
Prefer rank-1 s001 for K6/N5 until dekstop docker socket access is verified in CI logs
